name: Dynamic Translation Utility
author: Localization Team
description: Dynamic multi-language translations and locale conversions in AegisOS.

tools.name: Translate Text
tools.description: Translates raw string to target language locale.

prompts.name: system-text-translation
prompts.purpose: Directs LLMs to translate text accurately.
prompts.template: Translate the following text to the specified target language.
